summary: Iteration 43 - Refactoring Verification + Event Cost Tracker Test PASSED. All 27 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Event Cost Tracker panel working correctly with aggregate KPIs and detailed P&L breakdown. Three backend monoliths (event_workflow.py, fresh_meals.py, knowledge_engine.py) successfully refactored into 19 sub-modules with all API routes functional at original prefix paths.

integration_issues.issue: Intermittent 'Failed to fetch dynamically imported module' error on first load - resolved on retry
integration_issues.note: Module loads successfully after retry or page refresh

critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successful: Three monolithic files split into 19 focused sub-modules
event_workflow.py (1471 lines) -> 7 files: aggregator + core + booking + beo + financials + labor + purchasing
fresh_meals.py (1061 lines) -> 7 files: aggregator + core + dashboard + products + production + subscriptions + analytics
knowledge_engine.py (1002 lines) -> 5 files: aggregator + core + domains + recommend + config
All MongoDB _id fields properly excluded from responses
Frontend EventCostTracker panel properly integrated with data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: Test created: TEST_Iter43_Regression_Gala event with 3-course menu, 4 labor schedules, GL entries, and full workflow data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43 verified the major refactoring of three backend monoliths into 19 sub-modules plus the new Event Cost Tracker feature. All API routes work at original prefix paths: /api/event-workflow/* (18 routes), /api/fresh-meals/* (28 routes), /api/knowledge-engine/* (26 routes), /api/event-cost-tracker/* (3 routes). Frontend Event Cost Tracker panel accessible from sidebar under 'Analytics & Intelligence' section, shows aggregate KPIs and event list, drill-down to individual event P&L breakdown.

event_cost_tracker_new.list_events: PASS - returns events with cost summary, margins, status
event_cost_tracker_new.get_event_detail: PASS - returns detailed P&L breakdown with food/labor/opex/purchasing/revenue

event_workflow_regression.prospect_to_booking: PASS - creates event, calendar, notification, schedule
event_workflow_regression.attach_menu: PASS - creates BEO with menu courses
event_workflow_regression.get_beo: PASS - returns BEO with enriched data
event_workflow_regression.post_financials: PASS - posts GL entries, returns P&L

frontend_event_cost_tracker.aggregate_kpis: PASS - shows Total Revenue, Net Profit, Total Guests, Labor Cost, PO Value, Invoice Total
frontend_event_cost_tracker.events_list: PASS - shows 38 events with status and margins
frontend_event_cost_tracker.event_detail: PASS - shows P&L Summary, Cost Breakdown, Revenue Breakdown
frontend_event_cost_tracker.back_navigation: PASS - All Events button returns to aggregate view

mocked_apis.note: POS/GL integrations (Toast, QuickBooks) are scaffolded but disconnected. AI recipe generation uses Emergent LLM Key with deterministic fallback.
